review: Generally my family and i enjoy the food at eats but last night the restaurant looked and smelled bad. Almost like the grease hadnt been changed in a while.  The tables are so old they are sticky, the paper menus were tattered and the floor carpets looked dirty and black. I dont know if mgt has changed but it looked shabby which made me question the cleanliness of the kitchen. All the food seemed fine but i think they need to spruce up the place before i come back.
